touches.ai_summary: Cold call attempt to Zoey Richter, Head of RevOps. No answer, left voicemail introducing AskElephant's forecasting accuracy capabilities.
LinkedIn connection request sent to Zoey Richter with brief note about helping EdTech companies improve forecast accuracy. No response.
Follow-up LinkedIn message sharing case study on how similar-sized EdTech company reduced forecast error by 40%. No response.
LinkedIn message referencing PearlHub's recent growth and asking about current RevOps challenges. No response.
Final LinkedIn attempt asking if forecasting accuracy is a priority for Q2. No response.
Cold email to Zoey introducing AskElephant's AI-powered forecasting solution, highlighting integration capabilities and ROI. No response.
Second cold call attempt to Zoey. No answer, left brief voicemail referencing previous email. No response.
Follow-up email offering a 15-minute exploratory call to discuss RevOps automation challenges at PearlHub. No response initially.

First qualification call with Zoey (9min). She mentioned current forecasting challenges and that they're evaluating tools. Expressed interest in understanding how AskElephant differs from what they've seen.

questions_asked.question: What's driving you to look at forecasting solutions right now?
questions_asked.answer: Our forecasts have been off by 20-30% the last two quarters. Leadership is pushing for better visibility.

questions_asked.question: How does AskElephant handle integration with existing CRM data?
questions_asked.answer: We have native integrations with Salesforce, HubSpot, and can work with custom APIs. Data sync is real-time.

next_steps: Schedule deeper discovery call for next week

touches.ai_summary: Second qualification call with Zoey (13min). Discussed team structure, current tools, and evaluation criteria. She mentioned they're also looking at Clari but concerned about complexity.

questions_asked.question: Who else is involved in evaluating this type of solution?
questions_asked.answer: Samuel Rogers, our COO, will need to sign off. IT will need to do technical eval. My team will be the primary users.

questions_asked.question: What's your typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: We can get you up and running in 2-3 weeks for core features, full deployment within 6 weeks.

questions_asked.question: What are you using today for forecasting?
questions_asked.answer: Mostly manual in spreadsheets with some basic Salesforce reports. It's not scalable.

next_steps: Zoey to share current workflow documentation
Schedule discovery call with wider team

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent after qualification calls with overview deck, ROI calculator, and proposed agenda for discovery session.

questions_asked.question: Can you send some customer references in the EdTech space?
questions_asked.answer: Attached three EdTech case studies and can arrange reference calls if helpful.

touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn message attempt during prospecting phase. No response.
Follow-up call with Zoey (5min) to confirm discovery meeting logistics and participants. She confirmed Samuel and a few team members will join.

questions_asked.question: What would success look like for this project?
questions_asked.answer: Getting forecast accuracy to within 10%, reducing manual work for my team, and better exec visibility.

next_steps: Discovery call scheduled for next Tuesday
Zoey to send list of attendees

touches.ai_summary: Email confirming discovery call details with calendar invite and pre-work questionnaire to help tailor the session.
Follow-up email sharing blog post on forecasting best practices and EdTech-specific automation use case to build credibility ahead of discovery.

Full product demo with Zoey and RevOps team (52min). Walked through forecasting workflows, automation capabilities, and reporting. Team engaged with good questions. Zoey mentioned Clari demo is next week.

questions_asked.question: How customizable are the forecasting models?
questions_asked.answer: Fully customizable - you can adjust weighting, add custom fields, and train models on your historical data.

questions_asked.question: What's the learning curve for end users?
questions_asked.answer: Most users are productive within a few days. We provide training and have extensive documentation.

questions_asked.question: How does this fit with your Q2 planning timeline?
questions_asked.answer: We'd want to have something in place by end of May to impact Q3 forecasting.

objections: One team member concerned about change management and getting reps to adopt new process.
next_steps: Zoey to compare with Clari demo

touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn message during prospecting period. No response.

Technical evaluation call with Nora Williams from IT (44min). Covered security, data architecture, integration requirements, and compliance. Nora asked detailed technical questions and seemed thorough but positive.

questions_asked.question: What's your data retention and security model?
questions_asked.answer: SOC 2 Type II certified, data encrypted at rest and in transit, configurable retention policies, hosted on AWS.

questions_asked.question: How does the Salesforce integration work from an authentication perspective?
questions_asked.answer: OAuth 2.0 with user-level or service account options. You control permission scopes.

questions_asked.question: What's required from our team for implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Mostly configuration and data mapping. We handle the heavy lifting. Estimate 10-15 hours from your team.

next_steps: Schedule follow-up if additional questions arise

touches.ai_summary: Cold call attempt to Zoey during prospecting. No answer.

Second demo with Zoey and expanded team including Ava and Aria from RevOps (51min). Focused on specific workflows they requested, showed advanced automation features and reporting dashboards. Team asked about comparison to Clari.

questions_asked.question: How does AskElephant compare to Clari in terms of forecasting accuracy?
questions_asked.answer: Our customers average 15% better forecast accuracy. We use more advanced ML models and real-time data versus Clari's batch processing.

questions_asked.question: What's included in the unlimited automation tier?
questions_asked.answer: Unlimited workflows, integrations, API calls, and data syncs. No caps on usage.

questions_asked.question: Where are you leaning after seeing both demos?
questions_asked.answer: Your UI is cleaner and the automation is more intuitive. Clari felt overcomplicated for our needs. Need to discuss pricing.

next_steps: Target decision by end of month

touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn message from Zoey responding to earlier outreach, expressing interest in continuing the conversation.
Follow-up email after second demo with summary of discussion, answers to outstanding questions, and customer references.
Proposal call with Zoey (21min). Presented pricing for 43 seats on unlimited automation tier at $58,300 ACV. Zoey thought pricing was fair but needs to run by Samuel and procurement.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on the per-seat pricing if we commit to multi-year?
questions_asked.answer: We can discuss a small discount for a 2-year commitment. Typically 10-15% off.

questions_asked.question: What's your budget approval process?
questions_asked.answer: I have budget authority up to $50K. Anything above needs COO approval, which shouldn't be an issue.

next_steps: Zoey to schedule exec meeting with Samuel

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting with Samuel Rogers, COO (25min). Zoey and rep presented business case. Samuel supportive, asked about ROI timeline and implementation risk. Approved moving forward pending final terms review.

questions_asked.question: What's the payback period based on efficiency gains?
questions_asked.answer: Based on time savings and forecast improvement, typically 8-10 months for organizations your size.

questions_asked.question: What happens if we don't see the forecasting improvements?
questions_asked.answer: We have a 90-day satisfaction guarantee. If you're not seeing value, we'll work with you or provide a refund.

touches.ai_summary: Email to Zoey with revised proposal incorporating multi-year discussion and formal MSA for procurement review.
Negotiation call with Zoey and Wyatt from procurement (16min). Discussed contract terms, payment schedule, and requested changes to data ownership clause.

questions_asked.question: Can we do quarterly payments instead of annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: We can accommodate quarterly payments with a 5% uplift to cover payment processing.

objections: Procurement flagged standard liability cap as too low for contract size.
next_steps: Legal to review liability and data ownership clauses
Rep to send redlines by end of week

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up negotiation call with Zoey and Wyatt (20min). Reviewed updated contract language on liability and data terms. Wyatt generally satisfied but wants one more legal review cycle.

questions_asked.question: What's your standard liability cap?
questions_asked.answer: 12 months of fees, but we can go to 24 months for enterprise deals at this size.

objections: Wyatt wants explicit language on data portability if we ever switch vendors.

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call with Zoey, Wyatt, and Taylor from IT (28min). Discussed implementation timeline, support SLAs, and final contract terms. Most issues resolved, but pricing discussion resurfaced.

questions_asked.question: Can you include premium support in the package instead of making it an add-on?
questions_asked.answer: We can bundle premium support if you commit to a 2-year term.

questions_asked.question: What if we need to add seats mid-year?
questions_asked.answer: You can add seats anytime, prorated to your renewal date. Volume discounts apply at each tier.

objections: Wyatt pushed for additional 10% discount to match 'competitive offer' - implied reference to Clari pricing.
next_steps: Rep to check with management on additional discount

touches.ai_summary: Final negotiation call with Zoey and Wyatt (29min). Rep offered 8% discount for 2-year commitment plus premium support bundle. Zoey confirmed exec approval and Wyatt agreed to terms.

questions_asked.question: If we meet you at 8% off with 2-year term and premium support, can we close this week?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, that works for us. Wyatt will coordinate signature with legal.

touches.ai_summary: Confirmation email with final contract attached, countersigned and ready for PearlHub execution. Included implementation timeline and kickoff meeting invite.
